schema:description: Richard Ortega of Venezuela found these 11 slides that someone threw away. He digitized them and asked Reddit for help identifying them. Reddit users indicated the images were of UC Davis. You can see the thread here: [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/forgottenfilm/comments/sg8tk7/aerial_shoots_from_found_slides_does_anyone_know/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web2x&context=3) Someone made a side-by-side using Google earth: [Imgur](https://imgur.com/a/re0bccM). Our collection has few color aerial shots of campus and none online at present. These images could offer opportunities for additional side by side comparisons with current views of campus. Our collection has few color aerial shots of campus and none online at present. These images could offer opportunities for additional side by side comparisons with current views of campus. The finding aid is at the [Online Archive of California](https://oac.cdlib.org/findaid/ark:/13030/c8ww7qkh/).
schema:name: Aerial Photographs of University of California, Davis
